Title: CalPrm: Kp
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=Kp; Long Name=Speed controller proportional gain; Impl.Type=float32; Unit=A/rpm; Default=0.5; Min=0.001; Max=10.0; Resolution=0.001; Online Cal?=Yes; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=ALnrl; Used In Runnable=SpdCtrl_1ms; Physical Description=P-gain of speed PI loop; Impact if Wrong=Low: sluggish response. Notes: CalPrm ShortName=SpdRampRate; Long Name=Speed reference ramp rate; Impl.Type=float32; Unit=rpm/s; Default=1000.0; Min=10.0; Max=10000.0; Resolution=1.0; Online Cal?=Yes; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=ALnrl; Used In Runnable=SpdCtrl_1ms; Physical Description=Maximum rate of change of speed reference (rate limiter); Impact if Wrong=Too low: slow accel. Too high: mechanical stress / current spikes

Notes: CalPrm ShortName=KiIq; Long Name=q-axis current PI integral gain; Impl.Type=float32; Unit=V/(A·s); Default=50.0; Min=1.0; Max=5000.0; Resolution=0.1; Online Cal?=Yes; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=VPerALnrl; Used In Runnable=CurrCtrl_100us; Physical Description=I-gain for q-axis PI; per 100µs sample; Impact if Wrong=Too high: torque ripple / oscillation

Title: CalPrm: IOcThd

Title: CalPrm: TOtHyst
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=TOtHyst; Long Name=Overtemperature hysteresis; Impl.Type=sint16; Unit=°C; Default=10; Min=2; Max=30; Resolution=1; Online Cal?=No; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=TIdentcl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_10ms; Physical Description=Temperature must drop by this much below TOtThd to clear OT flag; Impact if Wrong=Too small: chattering. Notes: CalPrm ShortName=VdcOvThd; Long Name=DC bus overvoltage threshold; Impl.Type=uint16; Unit=V×10; Default=7500; Min=4000; Max=9000; Resolution=1; Online Cal?=No; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=VdcLnrl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_1ms; Physical Description=DC bus OV fault threshold (×0.1 → 750 V); Impact if Wrong=Too low: nuisance trips during regen. Title: CalPrm: VdcUvThd
Notes: CalPrm ShortName=VdcUvThd; Long Name=DC bus undervoltage threshold; Impl.Type=uint16; Unit=V×10; Default=3000; Min=1000; Max=4000; Resolution=1; Online Cal?=No; A2L Export=Yes; CompuMethod=VdcLnrl; Used In Runnable=MtrMon_1ms; Physical Description=DC bus UV fault threshold (×0.1 → 300 V); Impact if Wrong=Too high: spurious faults.
